name: player routes
expected_query: with "t1dec6cbbe0a76047954cfc84a0951895" as (select "nfl_plays_receiver"."gsis_id", COUNT(*) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays_receiver" inner join "nfl_plays" on "nfl_plays_receiver"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" and "nfl_plays_receiver"."playId" = "nfl_plays"."playId" where "play_type" = 'PASS' group by "nfl_plays_receiver"."gsis_id") select "player"."pid", t1dec6cbbe0a76047954cfc84a0951895.rate_type_total_count as player_routes_0, "player"."pos" from "player" left join "t1dec6cbbe0a76047954cfc84a0951895" on "t1dec6cbbe0a76047954cfc84a0951895"."gsis_id" = "player"."gsisid" group by t1dec6cbbe0a76047954cfc84a0951895.rate_type_total_count, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
